name: Tool Cards
summary: Visual card components for rendering agent tool use events. Includes specific cards for Bash, Read, Write, Edit, Glob, Grep, LSP operations, plus generic fallback and streaming agent cards. Each card shows tool input/output with collapsible details and syntax highlighting.
goals: Display agent tool executions as styled, collapsible card components
Provide specialized rendering for each tool type (Bash, Read, Write, Edit, Glob, Grep, LSP)
Support syntax-highlighted code display in relevant cards (Read, Write, Edit)
Handle streaming agent events with real-time content updates

acceptanceCriteria.given: An agent executes a Bash command
acceptanceCriteria.then: a card shows the command and its output with proper formatting
file path and content are displayed with syntax highlighting
a GenericCard displays the tool name and raw input/output

unit-test.given: An Edit tool event with old/new content
unit-test.then: removed and added lines are visually distinguished

unit-test.given: A code block with language detected

end-to-end.then: each tool type renders with its specific card component

syncMeta.baseCommitMessage: feat(sync-specs): add auto-detection status rules in Step 5 user review
